items.summary: The Royals lost to the Seattle Mariners, KC 0, SEA 2. Noah Cameron led the night, working 6.0 innings with 0 earned runs, 8 strikeouts and 2 walks. Salvador Perez supplied the loudest Royals contact at 110.0 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Mariners Recap
